yesNo.name: Yes or No
daySuggest.name: Daily Advice
question.tooltip: To get an accurate response from Tarot cards, ask questions clearly and specifically. Formulate your query to be open-ended (e.g., 'What do I need to know about...?' or 'How should I proceed with...?'), and avoid simple 'yes/no' questions. Focus on your situation, be sincere and open. The cards reflect your energy, so ask with clear intent and without rushing
question.error: A question needs to be asked
limit.title: Daily layout limit exceeded!
limit.body: Become a Tarot Practitioner or wait for a new day.
thematic_relationship.name: Relationships
thematic_relationship.description: The "Relationships" spread will help deeply analyze romantic connection from six key perspectives. It reveals mutual feelings of partners, their potential in relationships and provides wise advice for harmonious union development.
thematic_careerFinance.name: Career and Finances
thematic_careerFinance.description: The "Career and Finances" spread is designed for comprehensive analysis of professional and financial sphere of life. It will help understand the current state of affairs, identify hidden obstacles and find optimal paths to achieve career and material goals.
thematic_careerFinance.сardMeaning.3: Likely result if no action taken
thematic_love.name: Love
thematic_love.description: The "Love" spread reveals the dynamics of love relationships through the prism of mutual feelings and emotions. It will help understand the true attitude of partners towards each other and receive wise advice for harmonious development of romantic connection.
thematic_love.сardMeaning.0: What I feel for my partner
universal_celticCross.name: Celtic Cross
universal_celticCross.description: Celtic Cross is a classic and most complete Tarot spread that provides comprehensive understanding of any life situation. This ancient ten-card spread reveals all aspects of the question: from deep origins to final result, showing the path of events development and hidden influences.
universal_pyramid.name: Pyramid
universal_pyramid.description: The "Pyramid" spread represents a structured analysis of situation through hierarchy of influences — from basic foundations to final result. Unlike the Celtic Cross, which focuses on temporal dynamics of events, Pyramid reveals the multi-layered structure of the problem and offers a specific key to its solution.
universal_flame.name: Flame
universal_flame.description: The "Flame" spread represents a deep spiritual analysis of life situation, which, like fire, illuminates all hidden aspects and transforms understanding of what is happening. This twelve-card spread not only reveals practical sides of the question, but also shows spiritual lessons that the soul must extract from this experience.
universal_horseshoe.name: Horseshoe
universal_horseshoe.description: The "Horseshoe" spread is a classic seven-card spread which, like a symbol of luck, helps find a favorable path in any situation. Cards are laid out in horseshoe shape, creating a complete picture of events development from past to future with practical advice and warnings about possible obstacles.
selfDevelopment_mirror.name: Mirror
selfDevelopment_mirror.description: The "Mirror" spread is designed for deep self-knowledge and revealing all facets of personality through the prism of internal and external perception. This ten-card spread, like a multi-faceted mirror, reflects both obvious and hidden aspects of character, helping to understand one's true possibilities and directions for personal growth.
selfDevelopment_shadowSide.name: Shadow Side
selfDevelopment_shadowSide.description: The Tarot "Shadow Side" spread helps look into hidden aspects of personality, identify suppressed emotions, fears or unconscious motives that influence life. This spread is suitable for deep self-knowledge and working with internal conflicts
selfDevelopment_shadowSide.сardMeaning.0: Which of my qualities remain in shadow
selfDevelopment_shadowSide.сardMeaning.2: What their manifestation will lead to
selfDevelopment_shadowSide.сardMeaning.3: What will help me befriend my shadow
selfDevelopment_shadowSide.сardMeaning.4: What resources my shadow side can open for me
choice_twoPaths.name: Two Paths
choice_twoPaths.description: The "Two Paths" spread is created specifically for situations when it's necessary to make an important choice between two alternatives. This seven-card spread will help weigh all "pros" and "cons" of each option, showing possible consequences of both decisions and pointing to the most favorable outcome.
choice_crossroad.name: Crossroad
choice_crossroad.description: The "Crossroad" spread is designed for complex life situations when several paths of events development open before you at once. This nine-card spread will help understand the variety of options, consider all influencing factors and receive wise advice for making the most correct decision at life's crossroad.
